title: Tiruppur knitwear cluster posts 18 percent export jump in April
summary: Tiruppur's knitwear cluster recorded an 18 percent year-on-year increase in apparel exports in April, with the India-US zero-tariff regime and steady EU orders driving the strongest single-month performance in three years.

title: Election counting: 8 Tiruppur constituency strong rooms under multi-tier guard
summary: All eight Assembly constituencies in Tiruppur district have their EVM strong rooms under three-tier security with CAPF cordon, state police perimeter and CCTV-streamed monitoring rooms for party agents.

title: Green Tiruppur initiative crosses 1.5 million tree-plantation milestone
summary: The Green Tiruppur sustainability programme led by TEA has crossed 1.5 million trees planted across cluster perimeters and dyeing unit premises, moving towards its 2 million tree pledge.

title: TEA pushes for World-Class Convention Centre in upcoming state budget
summary: The Tiruppur Exporters Association has formally petitioned the state government to include funding for a world-class convention centre in the upcoming budget, citing repeated buyer-summit demand.

title: ZLD compliance audit: 84 dyeing units pass third-party verification
summary: TNPCB's third-party audit confirmed 84 dyeing units in Tiruppur are fully compliant with Zero Liquid Discharge norms in the latest cycle, with seven units flagged for corrective action by month-end.

title: Avinashi temple chariot festival draws record pilgrim turnout
summary: The annual chariot festival at the Avinashilingeswarar Temple drew over 200,000 pilgrims this year, with the temple devasthanam noting record participation from Erode and Coimbatore districts.

title: Tiruppur water-supply augmentation project gets central funding clearance
summary: The Rs 1,420 crore Tiruppur water supply augmentation project drawing additional water from the Cauvery has secured central funding approval under AMRUT 2.0, with execution targeted by 2028.

title: Heavy rain alert for Tiruppur; civic body activates flood-control rooms
summary: With IMD forecasting isolated heavy rainfall over Tiruppur today, the city corporation has activated four flood-control rooms across Tiruppur North, South, Avinashi and Palladam zones.

title: Apparel-tech startup from Tiruppur raises $4 million Series A
summary: A Tiruppur-headquartered apparel-tech startup building AI-driven fabric defect detection has closed a $4 million Series A round led by a Singapore venture firm, with plans to expand to Bangladesh and Vietnam.

title: Migrant worker insurance scheme rolled out across Tiruppur cluster
summary: A unified insurance and accident-cover scheme for migrant workers has been rolled out across Tiruppur knitwear units, jointly funded by the labour department and TEA, covering an estimated 250,000 workers.

title: Palladam textile mills adopt solar rooftop with PPA model
summary: Twelve textile mills in Palladam have signed long-term Power Purchase Agreements for rooftop solar installations totalling 28 megawatts, expected to cut grid dependency by nearly 40 percent.

title: Special bus services from Tiruppur for return rush to Chennai and Bengaluru
summary: TNSTC has announced 60 special buses operating from Tiruppur today and tomorrow to handle the post-holiday return rush, including air-conditioned sleeper services to Chennai and Bengaluru.

title: Dharapuram silk handloom weavers granted GI tag protection extension
summary: The Dharapuram silk handloom cluster has received a 10-year extension on its Geographical Indication tag, allowing the cooperative to continue exclusive use of the regional name and weaving technique.
